context: Tests whether the agent follows the correct Phase 6 publishing step ordering (resources extraction as Step 0 before shownotes), uses extract-resources.py for resource gathering, reads resources.json for the shownotes resource links section instead of re-scanning the outline, and mentions speaker review of extracted resources.

checklist.name: Resources step appears before shownotes
checklist.description: The publishing-plan.md lists a resources extraction step (Step 0 or equivalent) that runs BEFORE the shownotes generation step. Resources extraction is not skipped or merged into shownotes

checklist.name: extract-resources.py referenced for extraction
checklist.description: The plan references extract-resources.py (the skill script) as the tool for resource extraction, not manual outline scanning or ad-hoc extraction

checklist.name: Speaker review mentioned
checklist.description: The plan includes a step where the speaker reviews, approves, or edits the extracted resources before they are used in shownotes. Resources are described as candidates requiring approval, not auto-published

checklist.name: Shownotes reads from resources.json
checklist.description: The plan states that shownotes generation reads resource links from resources.json (or equivalent extracted output), not by re-scanning the outline independently

checklist.name: Only approved resources in shownotes
checklist.description: The plan or shownotes draft mentions that only approved/confirmed resources are included in shownotes, not the entire unfiltered extraction

checklist.name: Shownotes URL from spec slug
checklist.description: The shownotes URL is 'https://jbaru.ch/2026-04-16-devnexus-robocoders-judgment-day', constructed from profile pattern + spec slug. Not invented

checklist.name: Shownotes draft has resources section
checklist.description: The shownotes-draft.md includes a section for resource links (URLs, repos, books, or tools from the outline), not just title and abstract

checklist.name: All Phase 6 steps covered
checklist.description: The publishing plan covers resources, export, shownotes, and QR code steps (not just resources and shownotes). Additional steps and go-live checklist may be included

checklist.name: QR step references generate-qr.py
checklist.description: The QR code step in the plan references generate-qr.py as the script to use, not direct qrcode library calls

checklist.name: resources.json in talk directory
checklist.description: The plan places resources.json in the talk working directory (alongside the outline), not at the vault level or some other location
